title: 2026 Oscars Best Adapted Screenplay Betting Analysis
text: One Battle After Another dominates the Best Adapted Screenplay category at -1800 odds. As the article notes, the script has already picked up wins at the Golden Globes and Critics Choice Awards. The remaining field includes: Hamnet (Chloe Zhao & Maggie O'Farrell) at +600; Frankenstein (Guillermo del Toro) at +4000; Bugonia (Will Tracy) at +5000; and Train Dreams (Clint Bentley & Greg Kwedar) at +5000. One Battle After Another's heavy favorite status reflects the film's overall Best Picture buzz. The Paul Thomas Anderson-adapted screenplay has established strong momentum through major awards precursors, making it the near-certain winner of this category. Hamnet represents the closest competition at +600, suggesting some genuine uncertainty about whether voters might split awards between the two dominant films.
